characters.description: Feng Ming's independent disciple travels by sea with an assigned watcher and a younger cultivator. When a qi-shaped storm threatens their ship, Sen shields the entire vessel at grave cost to himself.
characters.name: Sen

characters.description: This formidable nascent-soul cultivator is Sen's master. Although absent from Sen's immediate traveling party, Feng Ming's influence and protective network shape the dangers surrounding his disciple.
characters.name: Feng Ming

characters.description: One of Sen's powerful teachers, Kho Jaw-Long trained him in spear combat and stands among the nascent-soul cultivators whose protection makes threatening Sen a dangerous proposition.
characters.name: Kho Jaw-Long

characters.description: Sen's alchemy teacher is a powerful nascent-soul cultivator and part of the mountain family that supports him. Her expertise underlies much of his practical knowledge of medicines and elixirs.
characters.name: Caihong

characters.description: A Ghost Panther closely attached to Sen, Falling Leaf is a spirit-beast companion whose loyalty places her among the people he values most.
characters.name: Falling Leaf

characters.description: A covert core-formation protector assigned by Feng, she accompanies Sen and a younger cultivator during their flight by sea. Her relationship with Sen is tense, but she takes her duty to protect him seriously.
characters.name: Feng's core-formation watcher

characters.description: This younger qi-condensation cultivator travels under Sen's protection while the group escapes pursuit. She and Feng's watcher are openly hostile toward each other, leaving Sen to manage friction within the party.
characters.name: Sen's younger qi-condensation companion

characters.description: An ancient, horse-sized divine turtle approaches Sen while he prepares a healing elixir on a beach. The seemingly benevolent spirit beast supplies rare ingredients and guides him toward an opportunity in body cultivation.
characters.name: Ancient divine turtle

characters.description: Judgment's Gale is an epithet associated with Sen, used by his younger companion while teasing him during a brief hidden rest on their overland flight.
characters.name: Judgment's Gale

characters.description: A demonic core-formation cultivator leads the force attacking Sen's concealed camp. He confirms that the assault was directed specifically at Sen.
characters.name: Demonic ambush leader

characters.description: An overwhelmingly powerful elderly cultivator blocks Sen's group from retreating and forces all three travelers toward the Temple of Eternity's Edge. He defeats their resistance with ease and warns that few who enter ever leave.
characters.name: Elderly temple captor

characters.description: The temple's elderly leader imprisoned Sen and his companions while trying to recruit them. He releases Sen and restores his possessions after learning which powerful cultivators stand behind him.
characters.name: Temple of Eternity's Edge leader

characters.description: A member of Feng Ming's local network in Lin Wen's Redoubt maintains the covert contact point where Sen and his watcher try to report their survival.
characters.name: Lin Wen's Redoubt network contact

characters.description: A local merchant in Lin Wen's Redoubt arranges an ambush for Sen and his watcher after their arrival is disclosed.
characters.name: Lin Wen's Redoubt merchant

characters.description: The estranged brother of Sen's fire-qi companion belongs to the fire cultivators fighting in Inferno's Vale. His presence in the conflict motivates her request that Sen enter the valley and help locate him.
characters.name: Fire-qi companion's brother

characters.description: A disciplined core-formation swordswoman fighting on the water side of the Inferno's Vale conflict, she formally challenges Sen as he tries to reach the fire compound. Sen defeats her in a demanding duel, then gives her medicine for her wounds.
characters.name: Water-side swordswoman

characters.description: A white-haired healer is impressed by Sen's treatment of the battlefield wounded and seeks to study alchemy with him.
characters.name: White-haired healer

characters.description: A young water-sect disciple with severe steam burns becomes Sen's patient after the battle. She has survived without infection, and he prepares an elixir and salve intended to reduce years of scar recovery to months without risking her cultivation.
characters.name: Water-sect burn patient

characters.description: The leader of the Order of the Celestial Flame summons Sen after observing him teach the Order's young sword students. She recognizes him as Judgment's Gale and requests a private audience.
characters.name: Order of the Celestial Flame matriarch

characters.description: The Order matriarch's white-haired daughter is the healer who sought Sen's instruction after the battlefield. Her connection to the Order places her earlier interest in his alchemy within the fire leader's household.
characters.name: Order matriarch's daughter

characters.description: Falling Leaf reacts strongly when Sen reports meeting someone known as Boulder's Shadow, showing unexplained prior knowledge of that identity.
characters.name: Boulder's Shadow

characters.description: A reluctant cultivator sent by the Order matriarch joins Sen in exchange for Sen receiving an exceptionally powerful spear. Sen accepts him only after making clear that he must contribute to the dangerous journey ahead.
characters.name: New travelling companion

characters.description: A careful prince of the Zhang family has built wealth and influence with help from a household diviner. After learning that Judgment's Gale will enter his region, he considers whether to seek a cautious alliance.
characters.name: Zhang-family prince

characters.description: An ancient cultivator who advises a Zhang-family prince, this diviner has repeatedly aided his patron with limited predictions. He foresees Judgment's Gale as a fate-changing opportunity that could also bring ruin.
characters.name: Noble's household diviner
